item.title: 5.9]台大首創全球換心技術！暴龍做的包包？讓蛇咬202次的美國大叔！黑洞炸彈在地球上演？【泛科學NEWS】
item.itunes:title: 5.9]台大首創全球換心技術！暴龍做的包包？讓蛇咬202次的美國大叔！黑洞炸彈在地球上演？【泛科學NEWS】
item.itunes:author: PanSci 泛科學
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=BOxjA58BMWU
看直播抽黃仁勳親簽的 NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090！

✨ 泛科學 x NVIDIA 線上 Watch Party！
 ✔️ 5 月 19 日 週一上午 10:30 泛科學YouTube直播
 ✔️ 超狂抽獎好禮：NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 🎉還有黃仁勳親筆簽名唷
 ✔️ 抽獎活動將於直播線上公開執行！記得揪好友一起看直播，越早進來聊天室，越有機會被點名互動、參與抽獎唷～

// 本週新聞 //
VML, Lab-Grown Leather Ltd. and The Organoid Company announce partnership to create world's first T-Rex leather
https://www.vml.com/news/vml-lab-grown-leather-ltd-and-the-organoid-company-announce-partnership-to-create-worlds-first-t-rex-leather
Snake venom protection by a cocktail of varespladib and broadly neutralizing human antibodies
https://www.cell.com/cell/fulltext/S0092-8674(25)00402-7
Low-intensity transcranial focused ultrasound amygdala neuromodulation: a double-blind sham-controlled target engagement study and unblinded single-arm clinical trial
https://www.nature.com/articles/s41380-025-03033-w
Creation of a black hole bomb instability in an electromagnetic system
https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.24034
Peter Pan tadpoles
https://www.canetoadsinoz.com/PeterPan.html
First-in-human zero-ischemia-time beating-heart transplant
https://www.jtcvstechniques.org/article/S2666-2507(25)00141-5/fulltext

https://www.livescience.com/animals/dinosaurs/t-rex-researchers-eviscerate-misleading-dinosaur-leather-announcement

https://youtu.be/OGN3b5F2pjc?si=iiu0gYi919gsgsXf
https://www.sciencenews.org/article/antivenom-snakebite-tim-friede
https://dellmed.utexas.edu/news/new-non-invasive-brain-stimulation-technique-shows-significant-reduction-in-depression-anxiety-and-ptsd-symptoms

https://zh.wikipedia.org/zh-tw/%E7%BE%85%E5%82%91%C2%B7%E6%BD%98%E6%B4%9B%E6%96%AF

item.title: 5.8]怕起火就換固態電池！鋰電池起火＝失控，有撲滅方法嗎？電動車真的安全嗎？
item.itunes:title: 5.8]怕起火就換固態電池！鋰電池起火＝失控，有撲滅方法嗎？電動車真的安全嗎？
item.itunes:author: PanSci 泛科學
item.content:encoded:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pEaRL0eKtUc
https://www.shanlishu.com/zh-TW/products/ms003zt030a
非化學B群，選用蕎麥與藜麥，萃取天然B群
兩款頂級穀物，讓B群結構更完整，吸收率更高

選擇貼近天然又高效的B群
首選山立樹超感維他命B群

#山立樹 #超感維他命B群"

// 延伸閱讀 //
手機老是沒電，鋰電池續航力怎樣才可以加倍呢？
https://pansci.asia/archives/151168
害怕電池變炸彈？工研院讓你安心免煩惱－STOBA創造高安全鋰電池
https://pansci.asia/archives/55632
